next_step.current_state: Have canonical gaming_friend record with birthday 1987-11-14. User requested only DD-MM-YYYY, so complete succinctly.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap with root tree, AGENTS.MD, and context; inspected 99_system per root rule; used canonical cast record as authoritative source for birthday.
function.outcome_justification: 10_entities/cast/lukas.md is the canonical cast record and explicitly lists relationship `gaming_friend` and birthday `1987-11-14`, which formats to 14-11-1987.
